item.title: Day 1 of making my BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe Cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon Hi everyone I am back with a new crafting project! After I did my chainmail Irulan cosplay, I kept thinking about the next project I should do, and decided to go for this one! I hope you like it, if you're interested to see more of my process videos please check out my Youtube Channel, and for final result pics I post them on my https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Hopefully I can finish this project in time for Anime Expo this year! :) Wishing you abgreat day, YuzuPyon Note : Please PAUSE TO READ TEXT I know it's pretty fast but the text is only optional for people who want more infos, will make long form video tutorials on my YT channel in the future, in the meantime social media platforms (and Imgur alike) limit videos to 60 seconds, it is what it is.
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Just Singing To The Birds.
item.description: Hi Imgurian, thank you for the Entertaining Accolade! Did you know that Bob Smith was the first openly gay comedian to appear on The Tonight Show and the first openly gay comedian to have a HBO comedy half hour? Now you do!✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Smith_(comedian) Oh Imgurian, can I treat you to a trivia tidbit? As a way to say thank you for the awesome Entertaining Accolade. Suzanne Westenhoefer was the first openly lesbian comic on television. On the Sally Jesse Raphael show, entitled 'Breaking the Lesbian Stereotype'. She also was the first gay comic on Late Night With David Letterman. Her HBO half hour special was nominated for a cable Ace Award.✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzanne_Westenhoefer Well hello Imgurian! Thank you for such a gracious Accolade! In turn I give you this: Pixar"s first openly gay lead in the short, 'Out', in 2020. It was about a man struggling to come out, and ends up switching bodies with his dog. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Out_(2020_film)✨
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: *inhale peace, exhale stupid, inhale peace, exhale stupid* who wants to explain the word "sterile" to him?
item.description: Edit: This is a real Dunning Kruger effect and I don't mean that as an insult. A lot of people have never thought about how big a hospital is and how clean it has to be. Think if a pt vomits on the wall and its green will anyone even notice? imagine what could be passed on in that time. if there are fake plants they collect dust, insects, etc, and they need to be thoroughly cleaned. Floors are white so you can see bodily fluids more easily. Imagine someone urinating on the floor, but because of the color its hard to tell if its water or urine when cleaning. after cleaning 400 rooms that day maybe the Janitor thinks they hit that spot already and leaves it. Its a huge knowledge gap that people don't always think about but staggeringly important.
item.dc:creator: softspokensatan

item.title: PRIDE POST: Socially transitioning, here was my cosplay for RETRO X
item.description:
Honestly, I think I NAILED it! I stand at 6ft flat-footed, with the added height from the boots and the hair I was probably about 6'5"!!!
I pieced my outfit together with things I already had: an old wig that I spent about 3 hours hacking into the right shape, stretchy lace top and matching lace gloves, a feather collar I bought for reasons I can't remember, a Venetian mask, crystal ball I've had for decades, the grave stompers that don't see much use anymore because I have to wear orthotics now, black leggings, a BMO beanie stuffed in place to create a comedically huge bulge, AND the Goblin King's pendant (a birthday gift)!!
Everything was so stretchy and comfortable! It only took a few minutes to get in and out of costume, so I was able to relax for 4 hours between the con and the after party (which was not necessary because I was the only one who showed up in costume). This was my first try at a masculine cosplay, and it was so exciting to have so many people come up to me to ask for a picture! My partner played photographer, he said that he wished I could have seen the delighted reactions as I walked past people, but I DANCED WITH THE GOBLIN KING at an anime convention masquerade over a decade ago and remember just how delighted I was! As I'm moving forward with my social transition, I'm becoming more confident in my masculinity, but because I live in such a hostile area for LGBTQ+ folks I have trouble leaving the house dressed as a man (as myself?) unless it's for a private event with security. I'm planning an accurate Beetlejuice costume for Halloween this year! Hold onto your LYDIAS or else they're ALL coming home with me!
item.dc:creator: Ryvienna

item.title: It’s pride, I’m drunk, confession time!!
item.description: Front Page Edit; First time ever reaching most viral, maybe that’s a sign. Thank you so much to everyone for the overwhelming support and love. I don’t know what my next steps may or may not be but thank you to everyone who messaged offering an ear. Woohoo front page.

Imagine
Well
A m e r i c a
This basically happened when Jon Kent Superman got a boyfriend.
THE WIZARD [Guitar Solo]
The popular image of the 1950s being all perfect families and malt shops is a lie that too many people buy into.

item.title: 26 years ago, an IRA bomb in the red car killed 29 people in Northern Ireland. This photograph was taken moments before detonation. The man and child in the picture survived, the photographer did not.
item.dc:creator: DataStream

item.title: Returning Images To the Wild
item.description:
Get this dog a country music contract
To adventure!
Me
Let him get bevvied
Hero
"have you ever been mistaken for a man?" *Morphs into Robert Patrick* "perhaps"
Accurate
This is longer than I remember (something I've never Heard being said to me)
WOT
Friend
Captain Toby
I'm so glad Tony Iommi has patched things up with Tony Martin. Hell yes, Headless Cross reissue
You got me on my knees
Animals of Farthing Wood energy
My son, he is very sick
Read this in the voice of Laszlo Cravensworth
They'll still thump you though
I see no problem here
Redwall conflict
8)
I'd risk MY life for a bargain
Surely these also have breathing problems like pugs but you never hear anything about it
The only explanation
I need the comfy chair
Frustration
Made in a Significant Oven
Willy's Wonderland spoiler with no context (watch Willy's wonderland)
Ello
George was best beatle
You know they absolutely could gender or role swap link and Zelda and it would work
Sorry ma'am
Go F yourself
Sensible chuckle
And his massive deuces will save the environment (this is a genuine plot point)
Another sensible chuckle
Neck Oil is a nice beer that has the unfortunate side effect of smelling exactly like cat piss
Same for people who mock "is it just me or" posts
Most supermarkets are owned by incredibly wealthy people. This is morally correct
Do it
Whoa, I'm halfway there
Good advice for the husband of the gay chap from the pop group Steps
Mustelid mage
Armitage Shanks defecation scenario
Light snack
Absolute tune
<3 love that this is implied in the monster verse
I'm autistic and once got banned from a videogame discord for posting this because it made the NTs uncomfortable
Horror. But I wonder, maybe just a little milk might work...?
He is literally firing six cannons at him
Trans ally tax

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
dude is gonna fall sometime
and the problem is?
mmm hmm
what if we kissed there?
must be at a stadium or something to need so many dryers in 1 bathroom
i hate contacts. glasses 4 life, yo
so why is a person holding one
definition of unhinged, dare i say
this dump is heavy on spider content i guess
i'm almost always pondering pizza
my apologies
yes it's a covid era meme. well i hadnt seen it and it made me laugh so yeah
gross
this dump was made on one
sweatpants or basketball shorts are my houseclothes
every time. weed has destroyed my short term memory
that's gonna do it for me... have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I am so sorry Nina
item.description: We adopted her about 11 years ago for mice control. I believe she was about 15 when she died Wednesday night. I didn't even like cats and she changed my mind. The guilt is killing me. I keep trying to remind myself we gave her a great life and it was an accident but it still fucking sucks. I'm sorry Nina and I will miss and love you forever. Most Viral Edit: Thank you for all the kind words and support and thank you to those who shared their stories as well. We all love our pets despite cultural and and socioeconomic differences. Most of you helped me remember that today and I am gracious for that. Nina was adopted from living in a 2×2' cage at a shelter. We needed a mouser both inside AND outside. She preferred to spend most her time outdoors and we provided safety, love and shelter. Anyone who wants to use her memorial post to promote only indoor cat living as an excuse for her death can fuck off. I was an accident. She wasn't that kind of cat and I'm glad I gave her the life she wanted and deserved. Love you and and thank you for the support. ❤️?❤️
item.dc:creator: Snuggelapolous

item.description: That cat on the left is up to something.
